stories.title: Play-In Night 3 — Final Two Seeds Decided Tonight (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT IS IT. 🏀

Magic vs. Hornets — 7:30 PM ET.

Charlotte hasn't seen the playoffs since 2016. LaMelo Ball is ready. Orlando wants redemption after falling to the 76ers.

ONE SPOT. ONE GAME. NO TOMORROW.

#HoopHeroes #PlayInTournament #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
WEST 8 SEED ON THE LINE 🔥

Warriors vs. Suns — 10 PM ET.

Curry (35 pts, 7 threes vs. Clippers) vs. Booker (26.1 PPG). A 38-year-old legend vs. a 29-year-old star.

This is the kind of game the NBA was built for.

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #Suns

article.headline: Play-In Night 3: Magic vs. Hornets and Warriors vs. Suns — Final Two Seeds Decided Tonight

stories.title: Lakers' Injury Crisis — Luka + Reaves Both Out for Rockets Series (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Luka Doncic is in MADRID getting stem cell treatment.

Austin Reaves is out with an oblique strain.

The Lakers tip off vs. the Rockets TOMORROW and their top two scorers are both gone.

This is unprecedented. 😳

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Grade 2 hamstring. Grade 2 oblique. Both starters. Both out.

The Los Angeles Lakers enter the 2026 playoffs without Luka Doncic AND Austin Reaves.

Rockets are the LAST team you want to face while that shorthanded.

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #Rockets

article.headline: Lakers Enter Playoffs Without Luka Doncic or Austin Reaves — Both Out for Rockets Series

stories.title: LaMelo + Knueppel — New Splash Brothers? Historic 3-Point Season (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Kon Knueppel: 273 three-pointers made.
LaMelo Ball: 272 three-pointers made.

First teammates to finish 1st AND 2nd in NBA threes since STEPH CURRY AND KLAY THOMPSON.

At 20 years old, Knueppel is rewriting rookie history. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Hornets #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
The NEW Splash Brothers are in Charlotte.

LaMelo Ball and Kon Knueppel led the NBA in three-pointers this season — 1st and 2nd — matching the EXACT feat that Curry and Klay Thompson achieved in 2015-16.

Now they're trying to end a 10-year playoff drought.

#HoopHeroes #Hornets

article.headline: LaMelo and Knueppel Make NBA History: New Splash Brothers Match Curry and Klay's 3-Point Record

stories.title: Steph Curry at 38 — Ageless Legend Carries Warriors to Play-In (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Steph Curry is 38 years old.

He scored 35 points. Hit 7 three-pointers. Dropped 27 in the second half. Hit the dagger with 50 seconds left.

Some players don't get better with age. Steph just refuses to get worse.

Tonight — one more game. 🎯

#HoopHeroes #Warriors

article.headline: Steph Curry at 38: One More Game, One More Reminder That the Legend Never Fades
